reviewer: paper-review skill, three-agent pass-3 deep audit

weaknesses.problem: 'Nuisance-invariant' framing of DINO/DINOv2/CLIP is OUR editorial gloss; none of those abstracts uses the term.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Rephrase as 'broadly transferable across image distributions and tasks — a property we read as approximate invariance to many photometric and framing nuisances'.

weaknesses.problem: RETFound's 'evaluation protocol motivated some of our ablation choices' overstates the link.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Downgrade to 'a comparable medical-domain foundation-model precedent in retinal imaging'.

weaknesses.problem: Compute claim '~85 min/run' understates EXP-004 actual wall-clock (97.6 min from progress.jsonl).
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Update anchor to '~95–100 min', total to '~28–31 A10G-hours'.

weaknesses.problem: Claims HF download path lives at src/derma_jepa/public_data.py; the HF coordinate is in scripts/.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Reword to attribute the HF coordinate to scripts/ and the manifest construction to public_data.py.

weaknesses.problem: 'figure-caption pairs' is editorialised; abstract says 'image-text pairs from ~4.4M scientific articles'.
'take other paths to similar ends' is vague.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: One-line mechanism descriptor: 'MAE reconstructs masked pixels; VICReg regularises variance, invariance, and covariance.'

weaknesses.problem: §5 and Appendix A overlap on headline numbers (~80% by agent's count).
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Keep both but clarify Appendix A's intent in its preamble (per-run-ID navigation anchor).

weaknesses.problem: 'two backbones, two scaffolds, two optimisers' reads as a complete 2×2×2 grid; only 4 cells run.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Explicitly say 'we did not run the full 2×2×2 factorial'.

weaknesses.problem: Unstratified-bootstrap caveat from §3.5 / Appendix D not surfaced as a limitation.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Add a numbered limitation pointing to Appendix D.

weaknesses.problem: EXP-007 reported as 0.945 single-seed without bridge to the 0.944±0.003 5-seed mean below.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Add 'on the original seed (5-seed mean 0.944 ± 0.003, see seed-sweep paragraph)'.
End §3.5 with one sentence forwarding to §4.

weaknesses.problem: §6 closes with 'rather than at chance', §7.1 opens with 'below random rather than at chance' — mild stutter.
pixel-L2 label collides with contamination caveat annotation in bottom-right corner.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Move pixel-L2 label below x-axis and shift the caveat annotation.

weaknesses.problem: EXP-004 / EXP-006a / EXP-006b label cluster overlaps in the bottom-right.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Add leader lines (annotate with arrows) and reposition labels.

weaknesses.problem: EXP-001 has no exp001-suffixed config (uses ham10000_hf_mounted.yaml).
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Optional: add a comment in App G mapping EXP-001 to the un-suffixed config.

could_not_break: All 12 headline numbers re-derive correctly from raw run mirrors at zero context (Pass 2, re-confirmed here).
Hyperparameters in Appendix B match per-run config.yaml files verbatim.
Run-ID naming is consistent across §A, locked-numbers.json, outputs/hf-runs/, and verify_claims.py.
Figure captions match figure content (with two cosmetic nits, fixed).
The abstract promises six things; the body delivers all six.
anti_inflation_applied: Citation rigor +6: A1/A2 framing fixes plus A3/A4 cleanups close the editorial-gloss attack vector.
Coverage +2: artifact-integrity items B1/B2 close honest-anchoring gaps.
Relevance +2 / positioning +2: scope and framing tightened.
Organization +2: §10 phrasing, §3.5 → §4 bridge, §7.1 stutter, A-per-run preamble.
Critical analysis unchanged at 80 (already strong from pass 2).

failure_modes_checked.result: clean — A2 reword removes the protocol-inheritance overclaim
